profil.nama: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk manufactures and sells cultural paper, pulp, tissue, and industrial paper in Indonesia, Asia, the United States, Australia, the Middle East, Africa, and Europe. The company provides cigarette packaging board, corrugated carton box, corrugated carton sheet, folding box, ivory, triplex, duplex, food packaging board, corrugating medium, test liner, single face box, and converted food service packaging products. It also offers color woodfree paper, color industrial paper, color book printing, Quran paper, color photo copy paper, color stationery, and duplicating paper. In addition, the company engages in manufacturing, trading, mining, and forestry; and provides financing, investment, and trading services. PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk is a subsidiary of PT APP Purinusa Ekapersada.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
